Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF IRMA VALDEZ'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with 10 days leave to amend.
